subcodes.first_line: Praise and thanksgiving beseem those who make mention in the most hallowed and exalted Court of that Remembered One, Who through the lights of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و شکر ذاکرین ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مذکوری را لایق و سزاست که بانوار بیان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection of Muhammad, @praise and encouragement
